news.t: Treasuries' October Curse Is About to End. What to Watch Next.
Bond ETFs rally as Powell says ‘time is drawing near' for potential Fed rate cut
Bond ETFs just hit the $2 trillion mark, could triple by 2030, says BlackRock
‘They can actually derisk their portfolios': Here's where BlackRock is seeing iShares bond ETFs garner inflows amid climbing bond yields

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Treasury Bond ETF (GOVT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE U.S. Treasury Core Bond index. The fund tracks a market-weighted index of fixed-rate nonconvertible U.S. Treasury securities with a remaining maturity of one year or more. GOVT was launched on Feb 14, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: ICE U.S. Treasury Core Bond Index
